name: thyme
summary: Mechanism context: respiratory support, antimicrobial, digestive support. Safety: Culinary use is generally low-risk; concentrated oil/extracts can irritate mucosa and require dose caution.. Interactions tracked: Potential additive irritation with other essential oils, theoretical caution with anticoagulants for high-dose extracts..

preparation: Leaf is used as tea, culinary herb, tincture, syrup, or steam aromatic; essential oil should not be taken internally without qualified guidance.
